name: Alliance Resources Limited
summary: Alliance Resources Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a mineral exploration and mining company in Australia. The company explores for gold and base metals. Its flagship property includes the Wilcherry project comprising seven exploration licenses that covers an area of 1,501 square kilometers located within the southern part of the Gawler Craton in the northern Eyre Peninsula. Alliance Resources Limited was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Southbank, Australia. Alliance Resources Limited is a subsidiary of Gandel Metals Pty Ltd.
